prose: **Benzaldehyde Fukui reactivity** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact four-center integrals) in PySCF (via chemkit), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: read from user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/benzaldehyde/benzaldehyde.xyz`, single-point calculation (no optimization). SCF converged for the neutral, cationic, and anionic states; no warnings reported. Partial charges (Mulliken) used to compute fukui indices. Most electrophilic site: C3 (atom label 3) with f⁺ = 0.39938967; most nucleophilic site: O1 (atom label 1) with f⁻ = 0.23839906. Live log is being written to `fukui_20260704-181256.out` (tail -f to monitor). Command: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/benzaldehyde/benzaldehyde.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --stdout path --out benzaldehyde_fukui_dft.json`.
